lesson: Select a ladder run only when every cell from top_y through bottom_y in its x column is '.'.
outcome: Prevents ladders from overwriting terrain, entities, spawn, or exit.
last_error: ladders[0] must cover only '.' empty cells

lesson: Choose bottom_y so the cell at (x, bottom_y + 1) is solid X ground.
outcome: Ensures each ladder ends on a mechanically valid lower landing.
last_error: ladders[0] needs X directly below bottom_y

lesson: Use only ladder coordinates inside the supplied grid dimensions; never extrapolate the level width.
outcome: Prevents coordinates that Python cannot map to a grid cell.
last_error: ladders[19] needs in-bounds coordinates with top_y < bottom_y

lesson: Keep ladder count and total expanded ladder tiles within the limits stated in the prompt.
outcome: Prevents oversized placement batches from invalidating the pass.

lesson: Check every proposed ladder against Python's validation feedback before repeating it.
outcome: Avoids repeating mechanically invalid placement patches.
